nasb.text: and they began selling their property and possessions and were sharing them with all, as anyone might have need.

esv.text: And they were selling their possessions and belongings and distributing the proceeds to all, as any had need.

cnv.text: 並且變賣產業和財物，按照各人的需要分給他們。

ccb.text: 他们把田产家业变卖了，按照各人的需要把钱分给大家。

csbs.text: 他们变卖财产和产业，按照各人的需要分给大家。
